languages.text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить Сектором Бионика, положил жизнь на исследование имплантов, способных передать точность движений рук хирургеона. Вивисектор Мартинакс помогал ему в изысканиях и надиктовал приставленному сервочерепу один из самых полных сборников размышлений о природе аугментации в Просторе Коронус.

Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить Сектором Бионика, положил жизнь на исследование имплантов, способных передать точность движений рук хирургеона. Вивисектор Мартинакс помогал ему в изысканиях и надиктовал приставленному сервочерепу один из самых полных сборников размышлений о природе аугментации в Просторе Коронус.

Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

languages.text: ジェネター・フェレンツはセクター・ビオニカの責任者として、外科医の手の動きを再現できるインプラントの研究に生涯を捧げました。彼は、生体解剖学者のマーティナックスの協力を得て、増幅の性質に関する最も包括的な論文を、割り当てられたサーボ・スカルに口述しました。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: ジェネター・フェレンツはセクター・ビオニカの責任者として、外科医の手の動きを再現できるインプラントの研究に生涯を捧げました。彼は、生体解剖学者のマーティナックスの協力を得て、増幅の性質に関する最も包括的な論文を、割り当てられたサーボ・スカルに口述しました。

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区，他毕生致力于研究完美复刻船医手部精密动作的植入物。解剖者马丁纳克斯协助了他的研究，并通过分派给他的伺服头骨，口述了一部关于科罗努斯扩区植入物改造本质的详尽专著。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区，他毕生致力于研究完美复刻船医手部精密动作的植入物。解剖者马丁纳克斯协助了他的研究，并通过分派给他的伺服头骨，口述了一部关于科罗努斯扩区植入物改造本质的详尽专著。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, passa sa vie à tenter de fabriquer des implants capables de la même précision que les mains d'un chirurgeon. Le vivisecteur Martinax l'assista dans ses recherches et dicta à leur servocrâne dédié l'un des traités les plus complets sur la nature de l'augmentation dans les Étendues de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable du secteur Bionica, passa sa vie à tenter de fabriquer des implants capables de la même précision que les mains d'un chirurgeon. Le vivisecteur Martinax l'assista dans ses recherches et dicta à leur servocrâne dédié l'un des traités les plus complets sur la nature de l'augmentation dans les Étendues de Koronus.

languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando del sector Bionica, dedicó su vida a investigar implantes de brazo capaces de replicar la precisión de los movimientos de un cirujano. El vivisector Martinax le ayudó en su investigación y dictaron a su servocráneo asignado uno de los tratados más exhaustivos sobre los aumentos de toda la Extensión de Koronus.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando del sector Bionica, dedicó su vida a investigar implantes de brazo capaces de replicar la precisión de los movimientos de un cirujano. El vivisector Martinax le ayudó en su investigación y dictaron a su servocráneo asignado uno de los tratados más exhaustivos sobre los aumentos de toda la Extensión de Koronus.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika'nın sorumluluğuna bırakılan Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını bir cerrahın el hareketlerinin hassasiyetini kopyalayabilen implantları araştırmaya adadı. Dirikesimci Martinax, araştırmasında ona yardımcı oldu ve Koronus Enginliği'ndeki ogmentasyonun doğası üzerine en kapsamlı incelemelerden birini kendisine atanmış hizmelete dikte etti.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, who was left in charge of the Sector Bionica, dedicated his life to researching implants capable of replicating the precision of a chirurgeon's hand movements. Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika'nın sorumluluğuna bırakılan Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını bir cerrahın el hareketlerinin hassasiyetini kopyalayabilen implantları araştırmaya adadı. Dirikesimci Martinax, araştırmasında ona yardımcı oldu ve Koronus Enginliği'ndeki ogmentasyonun doğası üzerine en kapsamlı incelemelerden birini kendisine atanmış hizmelete dikte etti.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz, der für den Sektor Bionica verantwortlich war, widmete sein Leben der Erforschung von Implantaten mit der Präzision der Handbewegungen eines Chirurgeums. Vivisektor Martinax unterstützte ihn bei seinen Forschungen und diktierte einem der abgestellten Servoschädel eine der umfassendsten Abhandlungen über das Wesen der Augmentation in der Koronus-Ausdehnung.

Vivisector Martinax assisted him in his research and dictated to the assigned servo-skull one of the most comprehensive treatises on the nature of augmentation in the Koronus Expanse.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz, der für den Sektor Bionica verantwortlich war, widmete sein Leben der Erforschung von Implantaten mit der Präzision der Handbewegungen eines Chirurgeums. Vivisektor Martinax unterstützte ihn bei seinen Forschungen und diktierte einem der abgestellten Servoschädel eine der umfassendsten Abhandlungen über das Wesen der Augmentation in der Koronus-Ausdehnung.
